source_meta.system_name: Insignia / Trident II Total Hip System

TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official Stryker materials support shared general hip instrumentation across Insignia and Trident II total hip workflows.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official Insignia materials describe the collared metaphyseal-filling femoral stem family.
Official Trident II materials describe the acetabular shell family used in the construct.
Official Trident II materials describe compatible polyethylene and modular bearing options.
Official Insignia surgical protocol states the stem is designed for use with Stryker V40 femoral heads and compatible acetabular components.

row.system_name: Insignia / Trident II Total Hip System
row.system_notes: Primary total hip construct anchored to official Stryker Insignia stem and Trident II acetabular materials.
